# Repository Copilot Instructions

Last updated: 2026-04-25

Use this file as a thin compatibility surface.

## Start Here
- Read root `AGENTS.md` first for the canonical workflow and command matrix.
- Read `TODOS.md` and `DECISIONS.md` before proposing or editing code.
- Read nearest subtree `AGENTS.md` for backend/frontend/documentation/demo areas.

## Required Behavior
- Keep changes scoped and testable.
- Run relevant checks for touched areas.
- Update docs when behavior or APIs change.
- Preserve instance-scoped backend contract unless explicitly migrating it.
